arg.name: config_package
arg.description: Package with Nav2, AMCL, and SLAM configuration used in the scenario.

arg.name: robot_model
arg.description: Robot model used to choose the default Nav2 config files.

arg.name: nav2_config_file
arg.description: Optional Nav2 config file name without the .yaml suffix.

arg.name: slam_config_file
arg.description: Cartographer config file basename without the .lua suffix.

arg.name: scan_topic
arg.description: LaserScan topic to normalize onto /laser_scan. Leave empty to use a robot-dependent default.

arg.name: pointcloud_topic
arg.description: PointCloud2 topic to convert into /laser_scan when use_pointcloud_to_laserscan is true.

arg.name: use_pointcloud_to_laserscan
arg.description: Convert a point cloud to /laser_scan instead of republishing a LaserScan topic. Leave empty to auto-select true for allie/cornelius and false for joe.

arg.name: cmd_vel_output_topic
arg.description: Stamped velocity topic used by the diff-drive controller.

arg.name: cmd_vel_output_frame_id
arg.description: Optional frame id used in the stamped velocity command.

arg.name: use_twist_mux
arg.description: Use twist_mux to choose between Nav2, keyboard, and joystick commands.

arg.name: twist_mux_config_file
arg.description: Twist mux config file basename without the .yaml suffix.

arg.name: use_joystick
arg.description: Start joy_node and teleop_twist_joy for local joystick control.

arg.name: teleop_config_file
arg.description: teleop_twist_joy config file basename without the .yaml suffix.

let.name: selected_nav2_config_file
let.value: $(eval '\'$(var nav2_config_file)\' if \'$(var nav2_config_file)\' != \'\' else \'allie_nav2\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'allie\' else \'cornelius_nav2\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'cornelius\' else \'joe_nav2\'')

let.name: selected_scan_topic
let.value: $(eval '\'$(var scan_topic)\' if \'$(var scan_topic)\' != \'\' else \'/\' + \'$(var robot_model)\' + \'/lidar/scan\' if \'$(var use_sim_time)\' == \'true\' else \'/lidar/scan\'')

let.name: selected_pointcloud_topic
let.value: $(eval '\'$(var pointcloud_topic)\' if \'$(var pointcloud_topic)\' != \'\' else \'/\' + \'$(var robot_model)\' + \'/lidar/points\' if \'$(var use_sim_time)\' == \'true\' else \'/ouster/points\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' != \'joe\' else \'/lidar/points\'')

let.name: selected_use_pointcloud_to_laserscan
let.value: $(eval '\'$(var use_pointcloud_to_laserscan)\' if \'$(var use_pointcloud_to_laserscan)\' != \'\' else \'true\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' != \'joe\' else \'false\'')
